Hero.title: Property management in <highlight>Bansko and Burgas</highlight>.
Hero.lead: Home2Host takes care of every part of running your short-term rental — from professional listings and guest communication to cleaning and maintenance. You earn the income; we handle the rest.
Hero.imageAlt: Bright living room with panoramic windows, a wooden ceiling, and a pool behind the glass doors

Contacts.heading: Get in touch
Contacts.lead: Have a property you want to rent out? A question about our services? Write to us — we reply within the working day.
Contacts.serviceAreaBody: Home2Host manages properties in Burgas, Bansko, and the surrounding regions. We provide reliable management and solid returns on your property.
Contacts.whatsappPrefill: Hello, I have a question about property management.

Contacts.metaDescription: Get in touch with Home2Host about managing your short-term rental property in Burgas, Bansko, and the surrounding regions — phone, email, WhatsApp, and an inquiry form.
